# Field Notebook

A working naturalist's notebook — trail walks, what was seen, and notes on the
birds and plants along the way. This is the home note; most paths through the
notebook start here.

## Start here

- [About this notebook](about.md) — what it is and how it's arranged.
- [Gear checklist](gear/checklist.md) — what goes in the pack.

## Recent walks

- [May 2](daily/2026-05-02.md) — Ridgeline Loop, first bluebirds of the year.
- [May 9](daily/2026-05-09.md) — Cedar Marsh, heron and a distant owl call.
- [May 17](daily/2026-05-17.md) — Quarry Overlook in the rain.
- [June 1](daily/2026-06-01.md) — Cedar Marsh again, cardinal flower budding.
